questions.question: How quickly will we see results from the marketing efforts?
questions.answer: Most practices begin seeing measurable results within 60-90 days. SEO improvements typically take 3-4 months to gain significant traction, while paid advertising and email campaigns can generate results within the first month. Patient reactivation campaigns often show the quickest ROI, with results visible within weeks. We provide monthly reporting to track progress across all channels and adjust strategies for optimal performance.

questions.question: Do we need to create our own marketing content?
questions.answer: No, our team handles all content creation. We develop professionally written website copy, blog posts, social media content, email campaigns, and advertisements tailored to your practice's unique brand and services. We conduct an initial branding interview to understand your practice philosophy, target patients, and competitive advantages, then create a consistent voice across all platforms. You'll have approval rights before any content goes live.

questions.question: How is dental marketing different from general marketing?
questions.answer: Dental marketing requires specific expertise in healthcare regulations (including HIPAA compliance), understanding of patient psychology, and knowledge of effective messaging for different dental services. Our platform is built specifically for dental practices, with proven templates, keywords, and strategies that work for patient acquisition and retention. We understand the unique challenges of marketing high-value services that many patients approach with anxiety or reluctance.

questions.question: Can we target specific types of patients or procedures?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Our platform allows for sophisticated targeting based on demographics, locations, and specific dental interests. For example, you can create campaigns focused on cosmetic dentistry for adults in higher-income neighborhoods, or target families for preventive care. We can emphasize particular procedures you want to grow, whether that's implants, clear aligners, sleep dentistry, or general family care.

questions.question: How do you measure marketing ROI for a dental practice?
questions.answer: We implement comprehensive tracking to attribute new patients and production to specific marketing channels. This includes call tracking numbers, website form analytics, and integration with your practice management software. Our dashboard shows key metrics like cost per new patient acquisition, production generated from marketing efforts, and ROI for each channel. Monthly reports break down performance and provide actionable insights for continuous improvement.

reviews.name: Dr. Jennifer Reynolds
reviews.comment: After struggling with generic marketing companies that didn't understand dentistry, switching to this platform was transformative. Within six months, we've increased new patients by 40% and our production is up by 32%. The website converts visitors at nearly triple our previous rate, and the automated recall system has brought back dozens of patients we hadn't seen in years.

reviews.name: Dr. Michael Chen
reviews.comment: As a multi-location practice, coordinating marketing was always challenging. This platform has streamlined everything with location-specific campaigns while maintaining consistent branding. The ROI tracking is impressive—we can see exactly which marketing efforts are driving production in each office. Our overall growth is up 28% year-over-year since implementation.

reviews.name: Dr. Sarah Williams
reviews.comment: The targeted campaigns have completely changed our patient mix. We're now attracting more fee-for-service patients and larger treatment cases. The content marketing and educational emails have positioned us as the dental experts in our community. Our social media presence has grown exponentially, and we regularly have new patients mention they found us through our online content.
